title: 8 PCS of Magnetic Bookmarks, Cartoon Magnet Bookmarks, Magnetic Page Clips for Students, Suitable for Men and Women Book Lovers, School, Home, and Office Reading Supplies
features: Soft Magnetic Bookmarks： Our bookmarks are made of paper and magnets, making them magnetic and easy to clip onto books without falling off. The soft magnetic material won't damage the surface of the book

8 Exquisite Styles: 8 magnetic bookmarks in various beautiful styles, featuring cartoon designs and clear, fade-resistant patterns. A variety of patterns are available to suit your preferences, making reading more enjoyable
Bookmarks and Decorations: Mark pages you've read so you can continue reading next time. Magnetic bookmarks are not only a reading aid but also a beautiful decoration for your books
Portable Bookmarks: Each magnetic bookmark measures approximately 14 x 6 x 0.5 cm. Compact and lightweight, they don't take up much space and are easy to carry

Ideal Gift: The magnetic bookmark set is suitable for students, teachers, and readers. It makes an ideal gift for Children's Day, birthdays, Christmas, Halloween, and more, perfect for surprising family or friends on special occasions
description: Discover the perfect blend of functionality and style with our 8 PCS Cartoon Magnetic Bookmarks. These magnetic page clips are a must-have for students, teachers, and book enthusiasts. Ideal for use at school, home, or the office, they serve as essential book accessories that elevate your reading experience. Product Dimensions: 14 x 6 x 0.5 cm Material: Paper You will receive: Set of eight magnetic bookmarks Item Weight: 30 g Enhance your reading journey with our versatile magnetic bookmarks, designed to cater to every reader's needs while adding a splash of color and creativity to your books.
